---
title: "<span style = 'font-size: 100%;'> QM 6700: Business Analytics </span>"
subtitle: "<span style = 'font-size: 150%;'> Probability </span>"
author: "Professor<br>Davi Moreira<br>"
# date: "2026-08-28"
# date-format: "MMMM DD, YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    center: true
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    #logo: images/quarto.png
    footer: "Business Analytics"
    theme: [simple,custom.scss]
html-math-method:
  method: mathjax
  url: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js"
---

## Overview

:::::: nonincremental
::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"}
- Experiments, Sample Spaces, and Events

- Assigning Probabilities

- Events and Their Probabilities

- Some Basic Relationships of Probability
  - Complement, Addition, Conditional, Multiplication
:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"}
- Conditional Probability and Independence

- Bayes' Theorem

- *(TBD — content to be developed for QM 6700)*
:::
:::::
::::::

# Section placeholder {background-color="#2C3E50"}

## TBD

Content to be developed.
